narrative:
Clark County has 84,060 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a clear Republican lean of 9.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.8% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.3% D−R vs -13.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
